title: SICP full-book section/example coverage manifest
goal: Create and maintain a literal coverage manifest proving that the SICP gate maps the entire book to executable evidence, not only the currently known major subsystem gaps.
next_actions: Audit SICP chapter by chapter and add a section/example coverage manifest to SICP_COMPLETENESS_REPORT.md.
For each section and example family, record the runnable tests/sicp/*.esk evidence that covers it or the exact ESH blocker that must create it.
Make the manifest distinguish book-required coverage from beyond-book stress coverage.
Update .icc/completion-oracles.yaml if the manifest exposes missing runnable probes beyond ESH-0029 through ESH-0033; current manifest-required extras are ESH-0035 through ESH-0037.
Keep the manifest in sync with scripts/run_sicp_smoke.sh so a green gate cannot hide an untracked omission.
acceptance: SICP_COMPLETENESS_REPORT.md contains a section/example coverage manifest for the full book.
Every manifest row has runnable evidence or a named open ESH task.
Every named book-required blocker has a corresponding ICC criterion or a documented reason why it is covered by an existing criterion.
scripts/run_sicp_smoke.sh and ICC sicp-completeness cannot pass while a manifest-required runnable probe is missing.
status_note: Initial full-book section/example coverage manifest is in SICP_COMPLETENESS_REPORT.md. It exposed additional required blockers ESH-0035 through ESH-0051 for Chapter 2 picture/generic gaps, Chapter 3 mutable/circuit/constraint/concurrency/stream gaps, Chapter 4 analyzer/derived/ambeval/parser gaps, and Chapter 5 stack/recursive-machine gaps.
ux_payoff: Prevents a misleading SICP claim by requiring explicit evidence for every part of the book before v1.3 can ship.
